description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named runtime-k210 that triggers on push and pull request events. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-18.04 environment, checking out the code, setting up ninja, downloading and installing K210 toolchains and SDK, setting up Python 3.7, installing Conan, and then configuring and running a CMake build with a custom toolchain. The workflow should also upload a build artifact named nncaseruntime-k210.
